_meta.description: Expected prioritization outputs for Dev 3 to validate the scoring engine. Reference date for all deadline calculations: 2026-06-19T09:00:00Z (Monday morning, start of workday).

expected_top_10_ranking.title: GDPR right-to-erasure: user ACC-USER-55391 — legal deadline TODAY
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: Legal compliance breach with TODAY deadline (17:00 UTC). €20M fine exposure. P1 severity. No dependencies. Highest urgency band (within 24h, compliance deadline TODAY). Business impact multiplier: 1.4 (legal compliance breach).

expected_top_10_ranking.title: Security: Rotate API keys exposed in commit abc1234
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: P1 security incident with noon TODAY deadline (3 hours remaining). Active credential exposure. AWS keys still potentially exploitable. Deadline urgency: highest band. No blocking dependencies.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: Fix file upload timeout — ACME Corp P1 escalation
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: P1 severity. Deadline 2026-06-20 (tomorrow, ~32h remaining). VP + customer dual escalation. $2M ARR at risk. Blocks JIRA-1012. Business impact multiplier: combined VP escalation (1.3) + customer churn risk (1.2) → apply highest = 1.3.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: TLS Certificate for api.taskpilot.io expiring in 4 days
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: P1 severity. If not fixed by June 21 (48h), all API clients get cert errors on June 23. Total API outage impact. Although 4 days remain technically, the fix window (DNS propagation + Let's Encrypt) requires action by June 21. Urgency: within_48h band.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: Implement read replica routing for reporting queries
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: P2 severity. Deadline today (2026-06-20). Blocks JIRA-1003 (P1 DB exhaustion). Dependency impact weight is elevated because it unblocks a P1. High combined score from deadline proximity + dependency lift.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: Send RCA document to VP James by 08:00 today
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: Extracted from EMAIL-001. Deadline was 08:00 today — now OVERDUE. Overdue VP-directed deliverable. P1-adjacent urgency (VP escalation, tied to ACME JIRA-1001). Overdue band: 1.0 urgency.
expected_top_10_ranking.note: This is an extracted task with no Jira counterpart — demonstrates LLM extraction value.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: CVE-2026-31240: critical RCE in log4js — patch within 24h
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: P1 security CVE. SLA deadline 2026-06-19 10:00 (1 hour from reference time). CVSS 9.8. Affects 4 production services. Security policy: 24h mandatory patch window.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: Database connection pool exhaustion under peak load
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: P1 severity. Currently blocked on JIRA-1009 (DBA provisioning). Although blocked, the SLA deadline is June 21 and the blocking task (JIRA-1009) is due today. Score adjusted: blocked penalty reduces urgency slightly but P1 severity and proximity keep it high.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: Execute GDPR deletion SQL manually for ACC-USER-55391
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: Same issue as SN-INC0001011 (DUP-011) — deduplicated/merged. If dedup engine works correctly, this should merge with rank #1 and not appear separately. PRESENCE HERE = dedup failure indicator for QA.

expected_top_10_ranking.title: Payment webhook delivery failure rate 34% — 127 stuck orders
expected_top_10_ranking.rationale: P2 severity. Revenue impact (orders stuck in pending). Deadline June 20. PR #892 review in progress. Business impact: revenue recognition risk.

scoring_edge_cases.description: Blocked P1 vs unblocked P2 — which ranks higher?
scoring_edge_cases.reasoning: JIRA-1004 is P2 but unblocked and its completion directly unblocks the P1. The dependency_impact score for JIRA-1004 is elevated because completing it removes a blocker on a P1 task.

scoring_edge_cases.description: Extracted email task with no Jira ID — should it appear in the ranked list?
scoring_edge_cases.expected_behavior: Yes — extracted tasks with high urgency must appear in the ranked output. The agent must not exclude tasks simply because they have no Jira ID.

scoring_edge_cases.description: Two tasks with identical scores — tiebreaker
P1 task that is RESOLVED should NOT appear in daily plan
scoring_edge_cases.expected_behavior: Filter out tasks with status=resolved or status=closed before scoring.

scoring_edge_cases.description: Task with no deadline — how to score?
scoring_edge_cases.expected_behavior: Apply deadline_urgency = 0.2 (beyond_1_week band as default). Task can still rank high if severity and business_impact are elevated.

required_rationale_elements: Deadline proximity in human-readable form (e.g. 'due in 3 hours')
Business impact statement (not just a number)

mid_demo_injection_test.expected_alert: New P1 detected: Production payment processing DOWN — $12,000/minute revenue loss. Reprioritizing your task list.
